ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "bus_model" TEXT /* Model of the bus */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the bus is assigned to */,
  "bus_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the bus */,
  "operational_status" INTEGER /* Whether the bus is operational or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the route (e.g., North, South) */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "num_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stop (e.g., Intersection, Landmark) */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., regular, transfer, terminal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chunks" (
  "chunk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chunk */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus the chunk belongs to */,
  "chunk_number" INTEGER /* Chunk number (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of travel (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "start_datetime" TEXT /* Start datetime of the chunk */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End datetime of the chunk */,
  "chunk_size" INTEGER /* Size of the chunk in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chunk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chunks_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES routes ("direction"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chunks_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "chunk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chunk the transaction belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop where the transaction occurred */,
  "fraction" REAL /* Fraction of passengers at the stop */,
  "transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions (e.g., boarding, alighting) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., boarding, alighting, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_chunk_id FOREIGN KEY ("chunk_id") REFERENCES chunks ("chunk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus the group belongs to */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the group belongs to */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the group (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Route 101 North) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger flow analysis */,
  "chunk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chunk the analysis belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop where the analysis occurred */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers at the stop */,
  "passenger_load" REAL /* Passenger load factor (e.g., 0.8, 1.2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_flow_chunk_id FOREIGN KEY ("chunk_id") REFERENCES chunks ("chunk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_flow_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the result belongs to */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the route (e.g., North, South) */,
  "optimized_route" TEXT /* Optimized route (e.g., detour, shortcut) */,
  "optimization_method" TEXT /* Method used for optimization (e.g., genetic algorithm, dynamic programming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops_route_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop-route mapping */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "stop_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stop on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_route_map_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_route_map_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bus_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_maintenance_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)
